zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte. Roger IV de Foix於大約1203年出生在法國奧德時，他的父親Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix14歲，母親Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne19歲。他於1231年2月17日與Brunissende de Cardona在法國阿奎泰貝阿結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1265年2月24日在法國米迪-列內斯豪-加洛希特加貝勒享年63歲，埋葬在法國米迪-列內斯豪-加洛希特加貝勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comte. Roger IV de Foix于大约1203年出生在法国奧德时，他的父亲Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix14岁，母亲Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne19岁。他于1231年2月17日与Brunissende de Cardona在法国阿奎泰貝阿结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1265年2月24日在法国米迪-列內斯豪-加洛希特加貝勒享年63岁，埋葬在法国米迪-列內斯豪-加洛希特加貝勒。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Foix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Beate, Dieter, Frieda, Guenter, Heinz, Lothar.
Americanized form of German Voit and of it Polish variant Fojt.

variants.name: Voit
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eberhard, Erwin, Fritz, Kurt, Otto, Reinhard.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

en.lifeSummary: When Comte. Roger IV de Foix was born about 1203, in Aude, France, his father, Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix, was 14 and his mother, Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne, was 19. He married Brunissende de Cardona on 17 February 1231, in Béarn, Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 24 February 1265, in Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, at the age of 63, and was buried in Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte. Roger IV de Foix est né environ 1203, à Aude, France, son père, Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Brunissende de Cardona le 17 février 1231, à Béarn, Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 24 février 1265, à Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte. Roger IV de Foix um 1203 in Aude, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix 14 und seine Mutter Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne 19. Er hat am 17. Februar 1231 in Béarn, Aquitaine, Frankreich Brunissende de Cardona geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Februar 1265 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich und wurde in Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte. Roger IV de Foix è nato il circa 1203 nel Aude, Francia, il suo padre, Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Brunissende de Cardona il 17 febbraio 1231, nel Béarn, Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 24 febbraio 1265, nel Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Comte. Roger IV de Foixが約1203年にフランスアウドで生まれた時，父Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foixは14歳，母Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagneは19歳であった。1231年2月17日にフランスアクイティアインブeアルンでBrunissende de Cardonaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1265年2月24日にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスハウテ-ガーオンシンテガベルで63歳で死去し，フランスミディ-プイルeンeスハウテ-ガーオンシンテガベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte. Roger IV de Foix(이)가 대략 1203년 프랑스 오드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1231년 2월 17일 프랑스 아키테인 브e아른에서 Brunissende de Cardona(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1265년 2월 24일 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 하테-가니 신테가벨에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 하테-가니 신테가벨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte. Roger IV de Foix nasceu aproximadamente 1203, em Aude, França, seu pai, Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Brunissende de Cardona em 17 de fevereiro de 1231, em Béarn, Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1265, em Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, França, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte. Roger IV de Foix родился около 1203 г. в местности ауд, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Brunissende de Cardona 17 февраля 1231 г. в местности бeарн, аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 24 февраля 1265 г. в местности синтегабелл, хауте-гаронн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности синтегабелл, хауте-гаронн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte. Roger IV de Foix nació aproximadamente 1203, en Aude, Francia, su papá, Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Brunissende de Cardona el 17 de febrero de 1231, en Béarn, Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 24 de febrero de 1265, en Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia.
